settings_sorry_import_feature_is_not_wor.en: Import function may not work properly now. To ease managing the application code and fixing some defects, we recently updated the model config data structure. As a result, we also need to modify the import function, which takes some time. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.
